title: Key themes to watch at Asia’s biggest AI tech show
description: Over a jam-packed week, the hardware linchpins of the post-ChatGPT era will debate the most pressing issues facing their industry, from growing bottlenecks in the supply of essential components like memory chips to the rise of challengers to Nvidia at the apex of the semiconductor hierarchy.

title: Purpose beyond panic: Higher education’s AI moment
description: Universities must shift from resisting generative AI to embracing it as a core tool for developing human potential and future-ready graduates.

title: How to Build a High-Converting Social Media Content Strategy Using AI Visual Tools
description: Your Social Media Content Is Producing Less Than It Should — Here Is Why Most social media content marketing strategies share a common structural weakness: the content production process is too slow, too expensive, and too inconsistent to sustain the publishing frequency and visual quality that modern platform algorithms reward. Brands and agencies that understand ... Read more The post How to Build a High-Converting Social Media Content Strategy Using AI Visual Tools appeared first on PhilNews .

title: CNN Sues Perplexity AI for Copyright Infringement and Systematic Content Scraping
description: CNN has sued Perplexity, accusing the AI search company of systematically scraping, summarizing, and reproducing its copyrighted articles without permission or adequate credit, depriving the outlet of traffic and revenue. The lawsuit follows similar actions by The New York Times, Dow Jones, and Forbes, highlighting broader industry tensions over fair use in generative AI.

title: How the middle-class should adjust to AI economy
description: Across the ecosystem, there is an active denial of reality, even as Indian tech majors quietly shed thousands of roles and tech forums buzz with panic over impending restructurings at global giants like Oracle
